fused_abstractions.name: BraveE2eReactor
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: BRAVE_BETA_EXECUTABLE from env|default. braveBetaLaunchOptions() returns { executablePath } only (IDE-safe). assertBraveBetaInstalled() in globalSetup at test run. Type: PlaywrightTestConfig['use']['launchOptions'] — not LaunchOptions from @playwright/test.
fused_abstractions.expansion_hint: Read all three E2E files full; see tests/e2e/README.md for Brave Beta constraints.

fused_abstractions.name: ConnectedReactor
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: fusion-sage.mdc (alwaysApply) routes fission (ai-optimization) + fusion (fusion-sage). /fission = no surplus. /fusion = Fused Insight + Surplus required.
